name: LinkedIn Warm Intro
description: Short LinkedIn connection request with warm, genuine tone. Targets single decision-maker per company. Very short body — LinkedIn limits and norms demand brevity. Surfaces a Slack preview and a file for review.

outreach.tone: Warm, genuine, human. Short. No pitch in the opener — just a shared context hook.
outreach.templateNotes: LinkedIn connection note: under 300 chars, reference one specific mutual context (shared community, article, or event). No URLs.
